summary: Completed testing of Iteration 11 features: Modal de detalle de vulnerabilidades and Vista mixta (grupos + informes individuales). All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with detail modal opening on row click, 'Agregar informes...' selector in group mode, and mixed view showing both grupos and individual informes in the same table.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, not blocking
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: GET /api/vista-comite mixed view - Contains both grupos (es_grupo=true) and individual informes (es_grupo=false)
GET /api/vista-comite grupo row - Has informes_incluidos array with all included reports
GET /api/vista-comite only informes_adicionales - Works without grupos
GET /api/vulnerabilidades with multiple informe_pentest params - Returns vulnerabilities from all specified informes
GET /api/vulnerabilidades for grupo informes - Can fetch all vulnerabilities for a grupo
GET /api/config/informes-sin-grupo - Returns list of unassigned reports (200)
GET /api/config/informes-sin-grupo - Excludes reports that are in grupos
GET /api/vista-comite row structure - Supports detail modal with all required fields
UI: Detail modal opens on row click in Vista Comité
UI: Modal shows vulnerability list with severity badges
UI: Modal shows 'X informes incluidos' badge for grupos
UI: 'Agregar informes...' button appears in group mode
UI: Button text updates to '+N informes' when informes selected
UI: Mixed view shows grupos with folder icon and individual informes without
UI: TOTALES row correctly aggregates both grupos and individual informes
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor improvement
Chart dimension warnings in Dashboard - cosmetic issue, not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Used existing grupo 'Primera Emulación' with 7 informes and 28 informes sin grupo for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 features fully tested: 1) Detail modal opens when clicking any row in Vista Comité table, showing all vulnerabilities for that informe/grupo with severity badges and counts. 2) Modal fetches vulnerabilities using multiple informe_pentest params for grupos. 3) 'Agregar informes...' yellow button appears in group mode (agrupar_por=grupo) allowing selection of informes sin grupo. 4) /api/vista-comite accepts informes_adicionales parameter for mixed view. 5) Mixed view shows grupos (with folder icon, es_grupo=true) and individual informes (no icon, es_grupo=false) in same table. 6) Button text updates to '+N informes' when informes selected. 7) TOTALES row correctly aggregates all rows.
